'''dharubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachline|beachline]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachline|beachline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dharubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæribith|dhæribith]] || [[word:dhæribij|dhæribij]] || [[word:dhæribish|dhæribish]] || [[word:dhæribi|dhæribi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dharurubuth|dharurubuth]] || [[word:dharurubuj|dharurubuj]] || [[word:dharurubush|dharurubush]] || [[word:dharurubu|dharurubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharubuth|dharubuth]] || [[word:dharubuj|dharubuj]] || [[word:dharubush|dharubush]] || [[word:dharubu|dharubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharufbuth|dharufbuth]] || [[word:dharufbuj|dharufbuj]] || [[word:dharufbush|dharufbush]] || [[word:dharufbuf|dharufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dharubuthu|dharubuthu]] || [[word:dharubuju|dharubuju]] || [[word:dharubushu|dharubushu]] || [[word:dharubuku|dharubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dharubuth|dharubuth]] || [[word:dharubuj|dharubuj]] || [[word:dharubush|dharubush]] || [[word:dharubu|dharubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dharubuthul|dharubuthul]] || [[word:dharubujul|dharubujul]] || [[word:dharubushul|dharubushul]] || [[word:dharubukul|dharubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dharubuthuthu|dharubuthuthu]] || [[word:dharubujuju|dharubujuju]] || [[word:dharubushushu|dharubushushu]] || [[word:dharubuku|dharubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dharubuthun|dharubuthun]] || [[word:dharubujun|dharubujun]] || [[word:dharubushun|dharubushun]] || [[word:dharubukun|dharubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dharubuthuoro|dharubuthuoro]] || [[word:dharubujuoro|dharubujuoro]] || [[word:dharubushuoro|dharubushuoro]] || [[word:dharubukuoro|dharubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
